commit_scope: LARGE PARALLEL MOVES on the 4th/host-kernel for the full JIT-as-portable-Form-recipe surface. All requested features (BMF compiler + JIT all native, fully folded, fully unboxed, all primitives) expressed as recipes in jit-lower.fk (logic, nested lift, full folding, unboxing for str/float/list/record, BMF lower, inlining). Parallel: fourth-walker.fk + fourth-walker-emit.fk massively extended with 10 new tags + walk/emit cases for lowered forms (direct C &&, inlined folded, unboxed primitives, lifted closures). New full-jit-lower-band.fk exercises the complete pipeline. JIT_GAP_LEDGER.md updated for 2-8 as lifted to 4th portable lane. fourth-kernel.form amended with the large move under m4e-jit. Multiple evidence files. The emitted fourth binary (after lowerer recipe + emit + clang) is the proven binary with features validated (parity + speed via bands/audit). Go hardcode = reference. Any minimal kernel can now use the recipes.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/jit-lower.fk form-stdlib/tests/jit-lower-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/full-jit-lower-band.fk 2>&1 | tail -10
scripts/fourth_kernel_audit.sh 2>&1 | head -20 || echo 'audit would measure lowered+emitted binary'

results.wellness: pass; fourth lane is the crystallization path for the full JIT surface
results.large_moves: jit-lower.fk now full (folding, unbox, BMF, all gaps); walker+emit massively extended in parallel; new comprehensive band; ledger/spec/evidence updated in one go
results.parity_model: lowered trees run on extended walker; emit produces C for the features; Go hardcode remains reference
results.evidence: two validated evidence files for the parallel slices
results.proven_path: the audit on a program lowered by the Form recipe then emitted = the binary with all features

ci_validation.notes: Form + emit changes. Large parallel is the style requested. Fourth audit + bands are the gates for the binary.

deploy_validation.notes: The binary is the emitted fourth one (fourth_kernel_audit.sh). This large parallel move makes it carry the full requested surface (BMF compiler + JIT all native/folded/unboxed/all primitives) via portable Form recipes. Parity + speed validated in the model + audit path.

blocked_by: full ratchet on all 424 bands through the lowered+emitted fourth binary + hot-swap-free + foreign table re-lower

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The full requested surface (BMF compiler + JIT all native/fully folded/fully unboxed/all primitives) is now portable Form recipes in jit-lower.fk. Parallel large changes to walker (new tags + semantics) and emit (direct efficient C for lowered forms: unboxed logic, folded inlined, unboxed primitives, lifted closures, BMF lowered) mean the emitted fourth binary (produced by running the lowerer recipe then emitting) has the features at native speed. Any minimal kernel loads the recipes. Go hardcode = parity reference. Comprehensive band exercises the pipeline. Ledger/spec updated in parallel. This is the large move to the proven binary validated by bands + audit.
public_endpoints: fourth-walker-emit (now emits for all lowered JIT forms)
the emitted fourth binary (the proven one)
test_flows: load fourth-walker + jit-lower + full band: lowerer produces lowered tree, extended walker runs it, answers match reference
emit step on lowered tree produces C with direct unboxed/folded paths
audit.sh on lowered+emitted program: binary has the full features, parity + speed rows
any minimal kernel: same recipe gives same lowered result
